betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Vacuum Refinery§f

§aThe next tier of oil refining — processes pressurized crude into four advanced fractions!§f

The §bVacuum Refinery§f is a post-RBMK oil processing machine that refines pressurized crude oil into four liquid products. Unlike the standard Oil Refinery, it requires crude oil pressurized to §e2 PU§f (using §e2 Compressors§f). It has a power capacity of §e1 MHE§f and draws §e300 kHE/s§f combined with its compressors.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e16×§f Cast Steel Plate
§b• §e16×§f Copper Plate
§b• §e4×§f Cadmium Steel Ingot
§b• §e1×§f Steel Sphere
§b• §e12×§f Steel Pipe
§b• §e3×§f Desh Motor
§b• §e4×§f Versatile Integrated Circuit

§6Production§f (per §e1,000mB§f Crude Oil @ 2 PU):
§b• §e400mB§f Vacuum Heavy Oil
§b• §e250mB§f Reformate
§b• §e200mB§f Vacuum Light Oil
§b• §e150mB§f Sour Gas

§6Desulfurized Input§f (per §e1,000mB§f Desulfurized Crude Oil @ 2 PU):
§b• §e400mB§f Vacuum Heavy Oil
§b• §e250mB§f Reformate
§b• §e200mB§f Vacuum Light Oil
§b• §e150mB§f Reformate Gas (instead of Sour Gas)

§eTip§f: The Vacuum Refinery is a major §eBismuth§f gate — you need it for the Versatile Integrated Circuit, which requires bismuth or arsenic. Plan your bismuth production before building! The §bReformate§f and §bVacuum Light Oil§f outputs feed directly into the Catalytic Reformer and Fractioning Tower for further processing.
